examples: Another friend mentioned he'd become a trucker.
Kim then runs to the highway and flags down a trucker for help.
Frank Amerosa, a retired trucker, had been diagnosed with brain cancer more than a year ago.
Hunt, the biggest trucker in the business, has managed just a 6% return in 2010.
By the mid-1980s, the CB-trucker craze had faded like disco into an obscure cultural curiosity.
